basic_details.job_title: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website health.delhi.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST candidates, 33 years for OBC candidates, further relaxable by 10 years for persons with disabilities.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree recognized by MCI, Registered with Delhi Medical Council, Completed internship within two years from date of advertisement
qualification.details: MBBS Degree recognized by MCI Registered with Delhi Medical Council Completed internship within two years from the date of advertisement

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Junior Resident.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Resident post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled on 22-05-2026 and 25-05-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree recognized by MCI and be registered with the Delhi Medical Council. The internship should have been completed within two years from the date of advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Level - 10 as per the 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Ambedkar Nagar Hospital located?
faq.answer: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110062.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
